case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. VS. NORMA L CASTRO

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CASTRO, NORMA L $5,842.85 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $317.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,085.35, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
